changes_made: Changed 'k8s_inventory_pod_labeling_for_tracking' to 'k8s_pod_labeling_for_inventory_tracking' for consistency with naming conventions.
Changed 'k8s_inventory_node_labeling_for_tracking' to 'k8s_node_labeling_for_inventory_tracking' for consistency with naming conventions.
Changed 'k8s_inventory_resource_annotations_for_metadata' to 'k8s_resource_annotations_for_inventory_metadata' for consistency with naming conventions.
review_notes: The control is applicable to Kubernetes as it involves maintaining an inventory of system components, which can be achieved through labeling and annotations. The original function names did not follow the naming pattern of starting with the specific resource. Adjustments were made to align with the naming conventions and improve clarity.
naming_improvements: Ensure resource type is specified first in the function name for clarity and consistency.
title: CCCS CM-8: System Component Inventory
step1_reasoning: The CCCS CM-8 control focuses on maintaining an inventory of system components, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that all resources (pods, nodes, etc.) are properly labeled and annotated for inventory and tracking purposes. This allows for a comprehensive understanding of the components running within the Kubernetes cluster.
